testcase.name: test_homepage_loads

failure.message: AssertionError: Critical JavaScript errors found: [{'level': 'SEVERE', 'message': 'network - A bad HTTP response code (404) was received when fetching the script.', 'source': 'network', 'timestamp': 1769312069680}] assert 1 == 0 + where 1 = len([{'level': 'SEVERE', 'message': 'network - A bad HTTP response code (404) was received when fetching the script.', 'source': 'network', 'timestamp': 1769312069680}])

testcase.failure: tests/test_bible_explorer.py:82: in test_homepage_loads assert len(critical_errors) == 0, f"Critical JavaScript errors found: {critical_errors}" E AssertionError: Critical JavaScript errors found: [{'level': 'SEVERE', 'message': 'network - A bad HTTP response code (404) was received when fetching the script.', 'source': 'network', 'timestamp': 1769312069680}] E assert 1 == 0 E + where 1 = len([{'level': 'SEVERE', 'message': 'network - A bad HTTP response code (404) was received when fetching the script.', 'source': 'network', 'timestamp': 1769312069680}])
